title: JACKSON COUNTY CONTINUUM OF CARE SCREENINGS - 211info
text: MEDFORD JACKSON COUNTY CONTINUUM OF CARE SCREENINGS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF This is an access point for being placed on Jackson County's Centralized Interest List for housing. 500 Monroe Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Age 24 or younger, or families with children ages 18 and younger, who are experiencing homelessnesss Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-5pm Email (541) 608-6868 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 608-6868 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for screening appointment and ask to be put into coordinated entry. Households will be placed on the Centralized Interest List for available housing. Most appointments will be in-person rather than by phone. Chat feature is available on website. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 10am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located across from Oakdale Middle School Services: Housing Related Coordinated Entry * Homeless Families Housing Related Coordinated Entry * Homeless Youth Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - MASLOW PROJECT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MEDFORD
